column2: Luxury agents filtered toward the $2M+ home segment
The prior workbook used broad top-producer lists. This revision adds a Nashville luxury-specialist sheet and a national luxury-fit screen.
A truly verified national list of agents whose closed transactions are specifically > $2M usually requires proprietary MLS / brokerage / subscription data. This workbook uses public signals only.
30 high-confidence Nashville-area luxury specialists/teams pulled from luxury-focused public profiles, brokerages, and media snippets.
470 national records from the RealTrends top-1000 source that also have at least one public luxury signal: luxury-branded brokerage and/or luxury-heavy market.
Original 1000 national top-producer records, now sorted by public luxury fit (High / Medium / Low). Use this if you need broader coverage after exhausting the high-confidence names.
High = luxury brokerage + luxury-heavy market; Medium = one of those signals; Low = neither signal visible in this public pass.
Compass, Sotheby's, Corcoran, Douglas Elliman, Coldwell Banker, Christie's, SERHANT, The Agency, Berkshire Hathaway Luxury, Nest Seekers, Engel & Völkers
NYC, Beverly Hills, Malibu, Palm Beach, Naples, Miami, Aspen, Park City, Scottsdale, Newport Beach, Nashville/Franklin/Brentwood, etc.
